org.apache.camel.model.A2ASubTaskDefinit.title: A2A Sub Task
org.apache.camel.model.A2ASubTaskDefinit.description: Groups route steps and emits A2A (Agent-to-Agent) protocol progress events before, after, or when the grouped work fails

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: Whether to disable this EIP from the route during build time. Once an EIP has been disabled then it cannot be enabled later at runtime.

emitAfter.title: Emit After
emitAfter.description: Simple expression template to emit after the nested steps complete successfully

emitBefore.title: Emit Before
emitBefore.description: Simple expression template to emit before the nested steps run

emitOnError.title: Emit On Error
emitOnError.description: Simple expression template to emit when the nested steps fail

failIfNoTaskContext.title: Fail If No Task Context
failIfNoTaskContext.description: Whether to fail if the current Exchange does not have an active A2A task context

org.apache.camel.model.AggregateDefiniti.title: Aggregate
org.apache.camel.model.AggregateDefiniti.description: Collects and combines related messages into a single message using a correlation expression and an aggregation strategy. Messages are grouped into buckets by correlation key and released when a completion condition is met.

aggregateController.title: Aggregate Controller
aggregateController.description: Reference to an AggregateController to allow external sources to control this aggregator.

aggregationRepository.title: Aggregation Repository
aggregationRepository.description: Reference to the AggregationRepository to use. By default uses MemoryAggregationRepository.

aggregationStrategy.title: Aggregation Strategy
aggregationStrategy.description: The AggregationStrategy to use. Required. Merges each incoming exchange with the existing already merged exchanges. At first call the oldExchange parameter is null.

aggregationStrategyMethodAllowNull.title: Aggregation Strategy Method Allow Null
aggregationStrategyMethodAllowNull.description: If true then null is used as the oldExchange at the very first aggregation, when using POJOs as the AggregationStrategy.

aggregationStrategyMethodName.title: Aggregation Strategy Method Name
aggregationStrategyMethodName.description: The method name to use when using a POJO as the AggregationStrategy.

closeCorrelationKeyOnCompletion.title: Close Correlation Key On Completion
closeCorrelationKeyOnCompletion.description: Closes a correlation key when its complete. Late arriving exchanges with a closed correlation key will throw a ClosedCorrelationKeyException. The value is the maximum cache size of closed keys. Use 0 for unbounded.

completeAllOnStop.title: Complete All On Stop
completeAllOnStop.description: If enabled then waits to complete all current and partial (pending) aggregated exchanges when the context is stopped, ensuring the aggregation repository is empty before shutdown.

completionFromBatchConsumer.title: Completion From Batch Consumer
completionFromBatchConsumer.description: Enables batch completion mode where aggregation completes based on the total number of exchanges reported by a batch consumer. Cannot be used together with discardOnAggregationFailure.

completionInterval.title: Completion Interval
completionInterval.description: A repeating period by which the aggregator will complete all current aggregated exchanges. Cannot be used together with completionTimeout.

completionOnNewCorrelationGroup.title: Completion On New Correlation Group
completionOnNewCorrelationGroup.description: Enables completion on all previous groups when a new incoming correlation group starts. Only one correlation group can be in progress at a time.

completionPredicate.title: Completion Predicate
completionPredicate.description: A predicate to indicate when an aggregated exchange is complete. If not specified and the AggregationStrategy implements Predicate, it will be used as the completionPredicate.

completionSize.title: Completion Size
completionSize.description: Number of messages aggregated before the aggregation is complete. Can also be set as an expression via completionSizeExpression.

completionSizeExpression.title: Completion Size Expression
completionSizeExpression.description: Number of messages aggregated before the aggregation is complete, evaluated as an expression allowing dynamic size values.

completionTimeout.title: Completion Timeout
completionTimeout.description: Time that an aggregated exchange should be inactive before its complete (timeout). Cannot be used together with completionInterval.

completionTimeoutCheckerInterval.title: Completion Timeout Checker Interval
completionTimeoutCheckerInterval.description: Interval in millis for the background task that checks for completion timeouts. Default is 1000 (1 second).

completionTimeoutExpression.title: Completion Timeout Expression
completionTimeoutExpression.description: Time in millis that an aggregated exchange should be inactive before its complete (timeout), evaluated as an expression allowing dynamic timeout values.

correlationExpression.title: Correlation Expression
correlationExpression.description: The expression used to calculate the correlation key to use for aggregation. Exchanges with the same correlation key are aggregated together. If the correlation key cannot be evaluated an Exception is thrown.

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: Whether to disable this EIP from the route during build time. Once an EIP has been disabled then it cannot be enabled later at runtime.

discardOnAggregationFailure.title: Discard On Aggregation Failure
discardOnAggregationFailure.description: If enabled then the partly aggregated message is discarded when aggregation failed (an exception was thrown from AggregationStrategy). Cannot be used together with completionFromBatchConsumer.

discardOnCompletionTimeout.title: Discard On Completion Timeout
discardOnCompletionTimeout.description: If enabled then the aggregated message is discarded (dropped) on completion timeout instead of being sent out of the aggregator.

eagerCheckCompletion.title: Eager Check Completion
eagerCheckCompletion.description: If enabled then the completion predicate evaluates against the incoming exchange. Otherwise it evaluates against the aggregated exchange.

executorService.title: Executor Service
executorService.description: Reference to a custom thread pool to use for parallel processing and sending out aggregated exchanges.

forceCompletionOnStop.title: Force Completion On Stop
forceCompletionOnStop.description: If enabled then all current aggregated exchanges are completed when the context is stopped.

ignoreInvalidCorrelationKeys.title: Ignore Invalid Correlation Keys
ignoreInvalidCorrelationKeys.description: If enabled then a correlation key that cannot be evaluated is logged and ignored, instead of throwing an exception.

optimisticLockRetryPolicy.title: Optimistic Lock Retry Policy
optimisticLockRetryPolicy.description: Configures retry settings when using optimistic locking.

optimisticLocking.title: Optimistic Locking
optimisticLocking.description: Turns on optimistic locking, which requires the aggregation repository to implement OptimisticLockingAggregationRepository.

optimisticLockingSyncRetry.title: Optimistic Locking Sync Retry
optimisticLockingSyncRetry.description: When optimistic locking is enabled, retries happen synchronously in the same thread instead of being scheduled on a background thread. This preserves transaction context for repositories that require single-thread transactional guarantees.

parallelProcessing.title: Parallel Processing
parallelProcessing.description: When completed exchanges are sent out of the aggregator, this option indicates whether Camel should use a thread pool with multiple threads for concurrency.

timeoutCheckerExecutorService.title: Timeout Checker Executor Service
timeoutCheckerExecutorService.description: Reference to a custom thread pool for the background completion timeout checker.

org.apache.camel.model.BeanDefinition.title: Bean
org.apache.camel.model.BeanDefinition.description: Invokes a method on a Java bean, with automatic parameter binding from the message body, headers, and exchange properties

beanType.title: Bean Type
beanType.description: The class name (fully qualified) of the bean to use.

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: Whether to disable this EIP from the route during build time. Once an EIP has been disabled then it cannot be enabled later at runtime.

method.title: Method
method.description: The method name on the bean to invoke.

ref.title: Ref
ref.description: A reference to an existing bean to use, which is looked up from the registry.

scope.title: Scope
scope.description: Scope of bean. When using singleton scope (default) the bean is created or looked up only once and reused for the lifetime of the endpoint.

org.apache.camel.model.BeanFactoryDefini.title: Bean Factory
org.apache.camel.model.BeanFactoryDefini.description: Defines a custom bean that can be used in Camel routes and other beans. The bean is created by a factory class or method.

builderClass.title: Builder Class
builderClass.description: Fully qualified class name of builder class to use for creating and configuring the bean. The builder will use the properties values to configure the bean.

builderMethod.title: Builder Method
builderMethod.description: Name of method when using builder class. This method is invoked after configuring to create the actual bean. This method is often named build (used by default).

constructors.title: Constructors
constructors.description: Optional constructor arguments for creating the bean. Arguments correspond to specific index of the constructor argument list, starting from zero.

destroyMethod.title: Destroy Method
destroyMethod.description: The name of the custom destroy method to invoke on bean shutdown, such as when Camel is shutting down. The method must have no arguments, but may throw any exception.

factoryBean.title: Factory Bean
factoryBean.description: Name of factory bean (bean id) to use for creating the bean.

factoryMethod.title: Factory Method
factoryMethod.description: Name of method to invoke when creating the bean via a factory bean.

initMethod.title: Init Method
initMethod.description: The name of the custom initialization method to invoke after setting bean properties. The method must have no arguments, but may throw any exception.

name.title: Name
name.description: The name of the bean (bean id).

properties.title: Properties
properties.description: Optional properties to set on the created bean.

script.title: Script
script.description: The script to execute that creates the bean when using scripting languages.

scriptLanguage.title: Script Language
scriptLanguage.description: The script language to use when using inlined script for creating the bean, such as groovy, java, javascript etc.

scriptPropertyPlaceholders.title: Script Property Placeholders
scriptPropertyPlaceholders.description: Whether the script should support using Camel property placeholder syntax {{ }}.

type.title: Type
type.description: The class name (fully qualified) of the bean.

org.apache.camel.model.CatchDefinition.title: Do Catch
org.apache.camel.model.CatchDefinition.description: Catches specific exceptions within a doTry block, allowing fine-grained exception handling within the route

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: Whether to disable this EIP from the route during build time. Once an EIP has been disabled then it cannot be enabled later at runtime.

exception.title: Exception
exception.description: The exception class names (fully qualified) to catch.

onWhen.title: On When
onWhen.description: An additional predicate that must evaluate to true for this doCatch to trigger. Allows fine-grained control over which exceptions are caught based on the exchange state.

org.apache.camel.model.ChoiceDefinition.title: Choice
org.apache.camel.model.ChoiceDefinition.description: Routes messages to different steps based on a series of conditions (predicates), similar to if-elseif-else in Java. Each condition is evaluated in order until one matches.

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: Whether to disable this EIP from the route during build time. Once an EIP has been disabled then it cannot be enabled later at runtime.

otherwise.title: Otherwise
otherwise.description: The otherwise clause to execute when none of the when predicates matched.

precondition.title: Precondition
precondition.description: If enabled then the choice is evaluated at route initialization time (precondition). Only when predicates with property placeholders or simple expressions using only property placeholders are supported.

when.title: When
when.description: The when clauses (predicates) to evaluate. The first when clause that matches determines which route branch to follow.

org.apache.camel.model.CircuitBreakerDef.title: Circuit Breaker
org.apache.camel.model.CircuitBreakerDef.description: Wraps message processing with a circuit breaker for fault tolerance. Prevents cascading failures by short-circuiting calls to an unhealthy service and routing to a fallback

configuration.title: Configuration
configuration.description: Refers to a circuit breaker configuration to use for configuring the circuit breaker EIP.

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: Whether to disable this EIP from the route during build time. Once an EIP has been disabled then it cannot be enabled later at runtime.

faultToleranceConfiguration.title: Fault Tolerance Configuration
faultToleranceConfiguration.description: Configures the circuit breaker to use MicroProfile Fault Tolerance with the given configuration.

onFallback.title: On Fallback
onFallback.description: The fallback route path to execute when the circuit breaker triggers.

resilience4jConfiguration.title: Resilience4j Configuration
resilience4jConfiguration.description: Configures the circuit breaker to use Resilience4j with the given configuration.

org.apache.camel.model.ClaimCheckDefinit.title: Claim Check
org.apache.camel.model.ClaimCheckDefinit.description: Temporarily stores the message content and replaces it with a claim check key, allowing the content to be retrieved later in the route. Useful for reducing memory when large payloads pass through processing steps that don't need them.

aggregationStrategy.title: Aggregation Strategy
aggregationStrategy.description: Reference to a custom AggregationStrategy to use for merging data back from the claim check repository.

aggregationStrategyMethodName.title: Aggregation Strategy Method Name
aggregationStrategyMethodName.description: The method name to use when using a POJO as the AggregationStrategy.

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: Whether to disable this EIP from the route during build time. Once an EIP has been disabled then it cannot be enabled later at runtime.

filter.title: Filter
filter.description: Specifies a filter to control what data gets merged back when using Get or Pop operations. Use body, headers, header:pattern to include only matching data.

key.title: Key
key.description: The unique claim check key to use for Get, GetAndRemove, and Set operations.

operation.title: Operation
operation.description: The claim check operation to use. Get=retrieve, GetAndRemove=retrieve and remove, Set=store with key, Push=store on stack, Pop=retrieve from stack.

org.apache.camel.model.ContextScanDefini.title: Context Scan
org.apache.camel.model.ContextScanDefini.description: Scans for RouteBuilder instances in the Camel registry to auto-discover and register routes

excludes.title: Excludes
excludes.description: Exclude finding route builder from these java package names.

includeNonSingletons.title: Include Non Singletons
includeNonSingletons.description: Whether to include non-singleton beans (prototypes). By default only singleton beans are included in the context scan.

includes.title: Includes
includes.description: Include finding route builder from these java package names.

org.apache.camel.model.ConvertBodyDefini.title: Convert Body To
org.apache.camel.model.ConvertBodyDefini.description: Converts the message body to a specified Java type using Camel's built-in type converters

charset.title: Charset
charset.description: To use a specific charset when converting.

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: Whether to disable this EIP from the route during build time. Once an EIP has been disabled then it cannot be enabled later at runtime.

mandatory.title: Mandatory
mandatory.description: Whether the conversion is mandatory. If mandatory and conversion is not possible, a NoTypeConversionAvailableException is thrown. Setting this to false means null may be returned if conversion is not possible.

type.title: Type
type.description: The java type to convert to.

org.apache.camel.model.ConvertHeaderDefi.title: Convert Header To
org.apache.camel.model.ConvertHeaderDefi.description: Converts a message header value to a specified Java type using Camel's built-in type converters

charset.title: Charset
charset.description: To use a specific charset when converting.

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: Whether to disable this EIP from the route during build time. Once an EIP has been disabled then it cannot be enabled later at runtime.

mandatory.title: Mandatory
mandatory.description: Whether the conversion is mandatory. If mandatory and conversion is not possible, a NoTypeConversionAvailableException is thrown. Setting this to false means null may be returned if conversion is not possible.

name.title: Name
name.description: Name of message header to convert its value. The simple language can be used to define a dynamic evaluated header name.

toName.title: To Name
toName.description: To use another header to store the result. By default, the result is stored in the same header.

type.title: Type
type.description: The java type to convert to.

org.apache.camel.model.ConvertVariableDe.title: Convert Variable To
org.apache.camel.model.ConvertVariableDe.description: Converts a variable value to a specified Java type using Camel's built-in type converters

charset.title: Charset
charset.description: To use a specific charset when converting.

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: Whether to disable this EIP from the route during build time. Once an EIP has been disabled then it cannot be enabled later at runtime.

mandatory.title: Mandatory
mandatory.description: Whether the conversion is mandatory. If mandatory and conversion is not possible, a NoTypeConversionAvailableException is thrown. Setting this to false means null may be returned if conversion is not possible.

name.title: Name
name.description: Name of variable to convert its value. The simple language can be used to define a dynamic evaluated variable name.

toName.title: To Name
toName.description: To use another variable to store the result. By default, the result is stored in the same variable.

type.title: Type
type.description: The java type to convert to.

org.apache.camel.model.DelayDefinition.title: Delay
org.apache.camel.model.DelayDefinition.description: Delays message processing for a specified duration, which can be a fixed value or computed dynamically per message

expression.title: Expression
expression.description: The expression that determines the delay duration in milliseconds.

asyncDelayed.title: Async Delayed
asyncDelayed.description: Enables asynchronous delay which means the thread will not block while delaying.

callerRunsWhenRejected.title: Caller Runs When Rejected
callerRunsWhenRejected.description: Whether or not the caller should run the task when it was rejected by the thread pool.

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: Whether to disable this EIP from the route during build time. Once an EIP has been disabled then it cannot be enabled later at runtime.

executorService.title: Executor Service
executorService.description: To use a custom thread pool if asyncDelay has been enabled.

org.apache.camel.model.DynamicRouterDefi.title: Dynamic Router
org.apache.camel.model.DynamicRouterDefi.description: Routes a message step-by-step through a series of endpoints, determined dynamically by calling an expression repeatedly. The expression is called after each hop and returns the next endpoint, or null to stop.

expression.title: Expression
expression.description: The expression to compute the next endpoint URI to route to. The expression is called iteratively until it returns null to indicate the end of routing.

cacheSize.title: Cache Size
cacheSize.description: Configures the cache size for ProducerCache which caches producers for reuse. The default cache size is 1000. Set to -1 to turn off caching.

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: Whether to disable this EIP from the route during build time. Once an EIP has been disabled then it cannot be enabled later at runtime.

ignoreInvalidEndpoints.title: Ignore Invalid Endpoints
ignoreInvalidEndpoints.description: If enabled then invalid endpoint URIs are ignored and logged instead of throwing an exception.

uriDelimiter.title: Uri Delimiter
uriDelimiter.description: The delimiter used to separate endpoint URIs when the expression returns multiple endpoints. Default is comma.

org.apache.camel.model.EnrichDefinition.title: Enrich
org.apache.camel.model.EnrichDefinition.description: Enriches the message with additional data obtained by sending to another endpoint using request-reply. The reply is merged into the original message using an aggregation strategy.

expression.title: Expression
expression.description: The expression to compute the endpoint URI to enrich from.

aggregateOnException.title: Aggregate On Exception
aggregateOnException.description: If this option is false then the aggregate method is not used if there was an exception thrown while trying to retrieve the data to enrich from the resource. Setting this option to true allows end users to control what to do if there was an exception in the aggregate method.

aggregationStrategy.title: Aggregation Strategy
aggregationStrategy.description: Sets the AggregationStrategy to be used to merge the reply from the external service, into a single outgoing message. By default Camel will use the reply from the external service as outgoing message.

aggregationStrategyMethodAllowNull.title: Aggregation Strategy Method Allow Null
aggregationStrategyMethodAllowNull.description: If this option is false then the aggregate method is not used if there was no data to enrich. If this option is true then null values is used as the oldExchange (when no data to enrich), when using POJOs as the AggregationStrategy.

aggregationStrategyMethodName.title: Aggregation Strategy Method Name
aggregationStrategyMethodName.description: This option can be used to explicitly declare the method name to use, when using POJOs as the AggregationStrategy.

allowOptimisedComponents.title: Allow Optimised Components
allowOptimisedComponents.description: Whether to allow components to optimise enricher if they are SendDynamicAware.

autoStartComponents.title: Auto Start Components
autoStartComponents.description: Whether to auto startup components when enricher is starting up.

cacheSize.title: Cache Size
cacheSize.description: Sets the maximum size used by the ProducerCache which is used to cache and reuse producers when uris are reused. Use 0 for default cache size, or -1 to turn cache off.

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: Whether to disable this EIP from the route during build time. Once an EIP has been disabled then it cannot be enabled later at runtime.

ignoreInvalidEndpoint.title: Ignore Invalid Endpoint
ignoreInvalidEndpoint.description: Whether to ignore an invalid endpoint URI when trying to create a producer with that endpoint.

shareUnitOfWork.title: Share Unit Of Work
shareUnitOfWork.description: Shares the UnitOfWork with the parent and the resource exchange. Enrich will by default not share unit of work between the parent exchange and the resource exchange. This means the resource exchange has its own individual unit of work.

variableReceive.title: Variable Receive
variableReceive.description: To use a variable to store the received message body (only body, not headers). This makes it handy to use variables for user data and to easily control what data to use for sending and receiving.

variableSend.title: Variable Send
variableSend.description: To use a variable as the source for the message body to send. When using send variable then the message body is taken from this variable instead of the current message, however the headers from the message will still be used as well.

org.apache.camel.model.ErrorHandlerDefin.title: Error Handler
org.apache.camel.model.ErrorHandlerDefin.description: Configures error handling strategy for routes, controlling how failed exchanges are handled and redelivered

org.apache.camel.model.FaultToleranceCon.title: Fault Tolerance Configuration
org.apache.camel.model.FaultToleranceCon.description: Configures MicroProfile Fault Tolerance settings for the Circuit Breaker EIP, such as timeout, bulkhead, and retry parameters

bulkheadEnabled.title: Bulkhead Enabled
bulkheadEnabled.description: Whether bulkhead is enabled or not on the circuit breaker.

bulkheadMaxConcurrentCalls.title: Bulkhead Max Concurrent Calls
bulkheadMaxConcurrentCalls.description: Configures the max amount of concurrent calls the bulkhead will support.

bulkheadWaitingTaskQueue.title: Bulkhead Waiting Task Queue
bulkheadWaitingTaskQueue.description: Configures the task queue size for holding waiting tasks to be processed by the bulkhead.

delay.title: Delay
delay.description: Control how long the circuit breaker stays open. The default is 5 seconds.

failureRatio.title: Failure Ratio
failureRatio.description: Configures the failure rate threshold in percentage. If the failure rate is equal or greater than the threshold the CircuitBreaker transitions to open and starts short-circuiting calls.

requestVolumeThreshold.title: Request Volume Threshold
requestVolumeThreshold.description: Controls the size of the rolling window used when the circuit breaker is closed.

successThreshold.title: Success Threshold
successThreshold.description: Controls the number of trial calls which are allowed when the circuit breaker is half-open.

threadOffloadExecutorService.title: Thread Offload Executor Service
threadOffloadExecutorService.description: References a custom thread pool to use when offloading a guarded action to another thread.

timeoutDuration.title: Timeout Duration
timeoutDuration.description: Configures the thread execution timeout. Default value is 1 second.

timeoutEnabled.title: Timeout Enabled
timeoutEnabled.description: Whether timeout is enabled or not on the circuit breaker.

timeoutPoolSize.title: Timeout Pool Size
timeoutPoolSize.description: Configures the pool size of the thread pool when timeout is enabled.

typedGuard.title: Typed Guard
typedGuard.description: Refers to an existing io.smallrye.faulttolerance.api.TypedGuard instance to lookup and use from the registry. When using this, then any other TypedGuard circuit breaker options are not in use.

org.apache.camel.model.FilterDefinition.title: Filter
org.apache.camel.model.FilterDefinition.description: Filters messages using a predicate expression. Messages matching the predicate continue processing; non-matching messages are skipped.

expression.title: Expression
expression.description: The predicate expression to evaluate. Messages where the predicate returns false are filtered out and not routed further.

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: Whether to disable this EIP from the route during build time. Once an EIP has been disabled then it cannot be enabled later at runtime.

statusPropertyName.title: Status Property Name
statusPropertyName.description: Name of an exchange property to store whether the filter predicate matched or not. The value is stored as a boolean.

org.apache.camel.model.FinallyDefinition.title: Do Finally
org.apache.camel.model.FinallyDefinition.description: Defines steps to always execute after a doTry block completes, regardless of whether an exception was thrown or caught

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: Whether to disable this EIP from the route during build time. Once an EIP has been disabled then it cannot be enabled later at runtime.

org.apache.camel.model.GlobalOptionDefin.title: Global Option
org.apache.camel.model.GlobalOptionDefin.description: Defines a single global configuration option as a key/value pair for the CamelContext

org.apache.camel.model.GlobalOptionsDefi.title: Global Options
org.apache.camel.model.GlobalOptionsDefi.description: Defines a collection of global configuration options for the CamelContext

globalOption.title: Global Option
globalOption.description: A series of global options as key value pairs.

org.apache.camel.model.IdempotentConsume.title: Idempotent Consumer
org.apache.camel.model.IdempotentConsume.description: Filters out duplicate messages based on a unique message identifier and an idempotent repository that tracks previously seen IDs

expression.title: Expression
expression.description: The expression to compute the unique message ID used for duplicate detection. Messages with the same ID are treated as duplicates and skipped.

completionEager.title: Completion Eager
completionEager.description: Sets whether to complete the idempotent consumer eager or when the exchange is done.

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: Whether to disable this EIP from the route during build time. Once an EIP has been disabled then it cannot be enabled later at runtime.

eager.title: Eager
eager.description: Sets whether to eagerly add the key to the idempotent repository or wait until the exchange is complete. Eager is default enabled.

idempotentRepository.title: Idempotent Repository
idempotentRepository.description: Sets the reference name of the message id repository to use for storing processed message ids to detect duplicates.

removeOnFailure.title: Remove On Failure
removeOnFailure.description: Sets whether to remove or keep the key on failure. The default behavior is to remove the key on failure.

skipDuplicate.title: Skip Duplicate
skipDuplicate.description: Sets whether to skip duplicates or not. The default behavior is to skip duplicates.

org.apache.camel.model.InputTypeDefiniti.title: Input Type
org.apache.camel.model.InputTypeDefiniti.description: Declares the expected input data type for a route. Camel will apply a data type transformer if the actual message type differs at runtime.

urn.title: Urn
urn.description: The input type URN in the format 'scheme:name' (e.g. 'java:com.example.MyClass' or 'json:JsonOrder'). Declares the expected data type for messages consumed by this route.

validate.title: Validate
validate.description: Whether validation is required for this input type.

org.apache.camel.model.InterceptDefiniti.title: Intercept
org.apache.camel.model.InterceptDefiniti.description: Intercepts each message at every processing step in the route, allowing cross-cutting logic such as logging or auditing

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: Whether to disable this EIP from the route during build time. Once an EIP has been disabled then it cannot be enabled later at runtime.

onWhen.title: On When
onWhen.description: To use an expression to only trigger intercepting in specific situations

org.apache.camel.model.InterceptFromDefi.title: Intercept From
org.apache.camel.model.InterceptFromDefi.description: Intercepts incoming messages arriving from consumer endpoints, optionally filtering by endpoint URI pattern

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: Whether to disable this EIP from the route during build time. Once an EIP has been disabled then it cannot be enabled later at runtime.

onWhen.title: On When
onWhen.description: To use an expression to only trigger intercepting in specific situations

uri.title: Uri
uri.description: Intercept incoming messages from the uri or uri pattern. If not configured, then all incoming messages are intercepted.

org.apache.camel.model.InterceptSendToEn.title: Intercept Send To Endpoint
org.apache.camel.model.InterceptSendToEn.description: Intercepts messages being sent to a specific endpoint, allowing the message to be modified or the send to be skipped

afterUri.title: After Uri
afterUri.description: After sending to the endpoint then send the message to this uri which allows to process its result.

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: Whether to disable this EIP from the route during build time. Once an EIP has been disabled then it cannot be enabled later at runtime.

onWhen.title: On When
onWhen.description: To use an expression to only trigger intercepting sending to an endpoint in specific situations

skipSendToOriginalEndpoint.title: Skip Send To Original Endpoint
skipSendToOriginalEndpoint.description: Whether to skip sending the message to the original endpoint. By default, the message is both intercepted and then sent to the original endpoint.

uri.title: Uri
uri.description: Intercept sending to the uri or uri pattern.

org.apache.camel.model.LoadBalanceDefini.title: Load Balance
org.apache.camel.model.LoadBalanceDefini.description: Distributes messages across multiple endpoints using a load balancing strategy such as round-robin, random, failover, or weighted

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: Whether to disable this EIP from the route during build time. Once an EIP has been disabled then it cannot be enabled later at runtime.

org.apache.camel.model.LogDefinition.title: Logger
org.apache.camel.model.LogDefinition.description: Logs a message using an expression that can include message body, headers, and other exchange data

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: Whether to disable this EIP from the route during build time. Once an EIP has been disabled then it cannot be enabled later at runtime.

logLanguage.title: Log Language
logLanguage.description: The language to use for evaluating the log message, such as simple, groovy, or ognl.

logName.title: Log Name
logName.description: The logger name to use. By default the route id is used.

logger.title: Logger
logger.description: Reference to a custom SLF4J logger instance to use.

loggingLevel.title: Logging Level
loggingLevel.description: Sets the logging level to use for the log message. Available levels: TRACE, DEBUG, INFO, WARN, ERROR, OFF.

marker.title: Marker
marker.description: An optional SLF4J marker to use with the log statement.

message.title: Message
message.description: The log message to output. Supports simple language expressions.

org.apache.camel.model.LoopDefinition.title: Loop
org.apache.camel.model.LoopDefinition.description: Processes the message body repeatedly for a specified number of iterations, or until a condition is met

expression.title: Expression
expression.description: The expression that determines the number of times to loop. The result is converted to an integer.

breakOnShutdown.title: Break On Shutdown
breakOnShutdown.description: If enabled, the loop will not iterate until it reaches the end when Camel is shut down.

copy.title: Copy
copy.description: If enabled, a copy of the input Exchange is used for each iteration. That means each iteration will start from a copy of the same message.

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: Whether to disable this EIP from the route during build time. Once an EIP has been disabled then it cannot be enabled later at runtime.

doWhile.title: Do While
doWhile.description: Enables the while loop that loops until the predicate evaluates to false or null.

onPrepare.title: On Prepare
onPrepare.description: Uses a processor when preparing the exchange for each loop iteration. This can be used to deep-clone messages, or any custom logic needed before the looping executes.

org.apache.camel.model.MarshalDefinition.title: Marshal
org.apache.camel.model.MarshalDefinition.description: Serializes the message body into a specific data format such as JSON, XML, CSV, or Protobuf for transmission or storage

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: Whether to disable this EIP from the route during build time. Once an EIP has been disabled then it cannot be enabled later at runtime.

variableReceive.title: Variable Receive
variableReceive.description: To use a variable to store the received message body (only body, not headers). This makes it handy to use variables for user data and to easily control what data to use for sending and receiving.

variableSend.title: Variable Send
variableSend.description: To use a variable as the source for the message body to send. This makes it handy to use variables for user data and to easily control what data to use for sending and receiving.

org.apache.camel.model.MulticastDefiniti.title: Multicast
org.apache.camel.model.MulticastDefiniti.description: Sends a copy of the message to multiple fixed endpoints, processing them sequentially or in parallel, and optionally aggregating their replies

aggregationStrategy.title: Aggregation Strategy
aggregationStrategy.description: Reference to the AggregationStrategy to assemble the replies from the multicasts into a single outgoing message. By default Camel uses the last reply as the outgoing message.

aggregationStrategyMethodAllowNull.title: Aggregation Strategy Method Allow Null
aggregationStrategyMethodAllowNull.description: If true then null is used as the oldExchange when there is no data to aggregate, when using POJOs as the AggregationStrategy.

aggregationStrategyMethodName.title: Aggregation Strategy Method Name
aggregationStrategyMethodName.description: The method name to use when using a POJO as the AggregationStrategy.

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: Whether to disable this EIP from the route during build time. Once an EIP has been disabled then it cannot be enabled later at runtime.

executorService.title: Executor Service
executorService.description: Reference to a custom thread pool to use for parallel processing. Setting this option implies parallel processing.

onPrepare.title: On Prepare
onPrepare.description: Reference to a processor for preparing the exchange to be sent. Can be used to deep-clone messages that should be sent.

parallelAggregate.title: Parallel Aggregate
parallelAggregate.description: If enabled then the aggregate method on AggregationStrategy can be called concurrently. Notice that this would require the implementation of AggregationStrategy to be implemented as thread-safe. By default this is false meaning that Camel synchronizes the call to the aggregate method. Though in some use-cases this can be used to archive higher performance when the AggregationStrategy is implemented as thread-safe.

parallelProcessing.title: Parallel Processing
parallelProcessing.description: If enabled then sending messages to the multicasts occurs concurrently. The caller thread still waits until all messages are fully processed before it continues.

shareUnitOfWork.title: Share Unit Of Work
shareUnitOfWork.description: Shares the unit of work with the parent and each of the multicast exchanges. By default each multicast exchange has its own individual unit of work.

stopOnException.title: Stop On Exception
stopOnException.description: If enabled then stops further multicast processing if an exception or failure occurred during processing of an exchange, and the caused exception will be thrown. The default behavior is to not stop but continue processing till the end.

streaming.title: Streaming
streaming.description: If enabled then Camel will process replies out-of-order, in the order they come back. If disabled, Camel will process replies in the same order as defined by the multicast.

synchronous.title: Synchronous
synchronous.description: When enabled then the same thread is used to continue routing after the multicast is complete, even if parallel processing is enabled.

timeout.title: Timeout
timeout.description: Total timeout in millis when using parallel processing. If the multicast has not been able to process all replies within the given timeframe, then the timeout triggers and the multicast breaks out and continues.

org.apache.camel.model.OnCompletionDefin.title: On Completion
org.apache.camel.model.OnCompletionDefin.description: Defines steps to execute when route processing completes, either on success, failure, or both

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: Whether to disable this EIP from the route during build time. Once an EIP has been disabled then it cannot be enabled later at runtime.

executorService.title: Executor Service
executorService.description: Refers to a custom Thread Pool to be used for parallel processing. Notice if you set this option, then parallel processing is automatically implied, and you do not have to enable that option as well.

mode.title: Mode
mode.description: Controls when the on-completion callback runs. AfterConsumer (default) runs after the consumer has written the response back to the caller. BeforeConsumer runs before the consumer writes the response, allowing the on-completion route to modify the Exchange before it is returned to the caller (e.g. in InOut mode).

onCompleteOnly.title: On Complete Only
onCompleteOnly.description: Will only synchronize when the Exchange completed successfully (no errors)

onFailureOnly.title: On Failure Only
onFailureOnly.description: Will only synchronize when the Exchange ended with failure (exception or FAULT message)

onWhen.title: On When
onWhen.description: To use an expression to only trigger routing this completion steps in specific situations

parallelProcessing.title: Parallel Processing
parallelProcessing.description: If enabled then the on completion process will run asynchronously by a separate thread from a thread pool. By default this is false, meaning the on completion process will run synchronously using the same caller thread as from the route.

useOriginalMessage.title: Use Original Message
useOriginalMessage.description: Will use the original input message when an Exchange for this on completion. By default this feature is off.

org.apache.camel.model.OnExceptionDefini.title: On Exception
org.apache.camel.model.OnExceptionDefini.description: Defines exception handling for specific exception types, with options for redelivery, logging, and routing to error endpoints

continued.title: Continued
continued.description: When continued is set to true, the exception is handled and routing continues from the point of failure. Unlike handled, which stops the original route and only runs the onException block, continued resumes the original route after the onException steps complete. The exception is considered handled as well.

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: Whether to disable this EIP from the route during build time. Once an EIP has been disabled then it cannot be enabled later at runtime.

exception.title: Exception
exception.description: A list of exception class names to catch and handle.

handled.title: Handled
handled.description: When handled is set to true, the exception is suppressed and not sent back to the caller. The original route stops at the point of failure and only the steps in this onException block execute. The response returned to the caller is whatever this onException block produces. Use continued instead if you want to resume the original route from the point of failure.

onExceptionOccurredRef.title: On Exception Occurred Ref
onExceptionOccurredRef.description: Sets a reference to a processor that is invoked just after an exception occurred. Can be used to perform custom logging. Any exception thrown from this processor is ignored.

onRedeliveryRef.title: On Redelivery Ref
onRedeliveryRef.description: Sets a reference to a processor that is invoked before each redelivery attempt. Can be used to change the exchange before it is redelivered.

onWhen.title: On When
onWhen.description: To use an expression to only trigger this in specific situations

redeliveryPolicy.title: Redelivery Policy
redeliveryPolicy.description: Configures redelivery options such as maximum redeliveries, delays, and logging behavior.

redeliveryPolicyRef.title: Redelivery Policy Ref
redeliveryPolicyRef.description: Sets a reference to a redelivery policy to lookup in the registry to be used.

retryWhile.title: Retry While
retryWhile.description: Sets a predicate to control whether redelivery should continue. Redelivery continues as long as the predicate evaluates to true.

useOriginalBody.title: Use Original Body
useOriginalBody.description: If enabled, uses the original input message body (but not headers) when the exchange is moved to the dead letter queue after all redelivery attempts have been exhausted. This allows enriching the message with custom headers while keeping the original body. Cannot be used together with useOriginalMessage.

useOriginalMessage.title: Use Original Message
useOriginalMessage.description: If enabled, uses the original input message (body and headers) when the exchange is moved to the dead letter queue after all redelivery attempts have been exhausted. Cannot be used together with useOriginalBody.

org.apache.camel.model.OnFallbackDefinit.title: On Fallback
org.apache.camel.model.OnFallbackDefinit.description: Defines the fallback route that executes when the Circuit Breaker trips or the primary route fails

fallbackViaNetwork.title: Fallback Via Network
fallbackViaNetwork.description: Whether the fallback goes over the network. If so, the fallback is executed on a separate thread-pool to avoid exhausting the main thread-pool.

org.apache.camel.model.OnWhenDefinition.title: On When
org.apache.camel.model.OnWhenDefinition.description: Applies a predicate condition to filter when a parent definition (such as onException or onCompletion) should be triggered

expression.title: Expression
expression.description: The predicate expression to evaluate.

org.apache.camel.model.OptimisticLockRet.title: Optimistic Lock Retry Policy
org.apache.camel.model.OptimisticLockRet.description: Configures the retry policy for optimistic locking in the Aggregate EIP, controlling retry attempts and delays on version conflicts

exponentialBackOff.title: Exponential Back Off
exponentialBackOff.description: Whether to enable exponential backoff, so each subsequent retry delay is doubled until the maximum retry delay is reached.

maximumRetries.title: Maximum Retries
maximumRetries.description: Sets the maximum number of retries before giving up on acquiring the optimistic lock.

maximumRetryDelay.title: Maximum Retry Delay
maximumRetryDelay.description: Sets the upper bound on retry delay in milliseconds to prevent delays from growing unbounded when using exponential or random backoff.

randomBackOff.title: Random Back Off
randomBackOff.description: Whether to enable random backoff, which uses a random delay between 0 and the computed retry delay to avoid thundering herd problems.

retryDelay.title: Retry Delay
retryDelay.description: Sets the delay in milliseconds between retry attempts when the optimistic lock fails.

org.apache.camel.model.OtherwiseDefiniti.title: Otherwise
org.apache.camel.model.OtherwiseDefiniti.description: Defines the default branch within a Choice EIP that executes when no When condition matches

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: Disables this EIP from the route.

org.apache.camel.model.OutputTypeDefinit.title: Output Type
org.apache.camel.model.OutputTypeDefinit.description: Declares the expected output data type for a route. Camel will apply a data type transformer if the actual message type differs at runtime.

urn.title: Urn
urn.description: The output type URN, such as java:fully.qualified.ClassName or json:SchemaName.

validate.title: Validate
validate.description: Whether to validate the output type.

org.apache.camel.model.PackageScanDefini.title: Package Scan
org.apache.camel.model.PackageScanDefini.description: Scans Java packages on the classpath for RouteBuilder classes to auto-discover and register routes

excludes.title: Excludes
excludes.description: Exclude finding route builder from these java package names.

includes.title: Includes
includes.description: Include finding route builder from these java package names.

package.title: Package
package.description: Java package names to use for scanning for route builder classes.

org.apache.camel.model.PausableDefinitio.title: Pausable
org.apache.camel.model.PausableDefinitio.description: Pauses a consumer based on a condition, allowing it to be resumed later from the last known offset. Useful for controlling ingestion rate on polling consumers.

consumerListener.title: Consumer Listener
consumerListener.description: The consumer listener to use for pausing and resuming the consumer.

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: Whether to disable this EIP from the route during build time. Once an EIP has been disabled then it cannot be enabled later at runtime.

untilCheck.title: Until Check
untilCheck.description: Predicate to evaluate whether the processing can resume. Returns true if consumption can resume, or false otherwise.

org.apache.camel.model.PipelineDefinitio.title: Pipeline
org.apache.camel.model.PipelineDefinitio.description: Processes the message through a sequence of steps where the output of each step becomes the input of the next

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: Whether to disable this EIP from the route during build time. Once an EIP has been disabled then it cannot be enabled later at runtime.

org.apache.camel.model.PolicyDefinition.title: Policy
org.apache.camel.model.PolicyDefinition.description: Applies a policy to the route, such as a transactional policy or a custom policy for cross-cutting concerns

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: Whether to disable this EIP from the route during build time. Once an EIP has been disabled then it cannot be enabled later at runtime.

ref.title: Ref
ref.description: Reference to the policy to lookup in the registry.

org.apache.camel.model.PollDefinition.title: Poll
org.apache.camel.model.PollDefinition.description: Polls a single message from a consumer endpoint and sets it as the message body. Useful for fetching data on-demand from file, database, or messaging endpoints.

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: Whether to disable this EIP from the route during build time. Once an EIP has been disabled then it cannot be enabled later at runtime.

timeout.title: Timeout
timeout.description: Timeout in millis when polling from the external service. The default value is 20000 (20 seconds).

uri.title: Uri
uri.description: The uri of the endpoint to poll a single message from. The result is stored in the original message body (or in a variable if variableReceive is set).

variableReceive.title: Variable Receive
variableReceive.description: To use a variable to store the received message body (only body, not headers). This makes it handy to use variables for user data and to easily control what data to use for sending and receiving.

org.apache.camel.model.PollEnrichDefinit.title: Poll Enrich
org.apache.camel.model.PollEnrichDefinit.description: Enriches the message with additional data obtained by polling a consumer endpoint (such as a file or message queue). The polled data is merged using an aggregation strategy.

expression.title: Expression
expression.description: The expression to compute the endpoint URI to poll-enrich from.

aggregateOnException.title: Aggregate On Exception
aggregateOnException.description: If this option is false then the aggregate method is not used if there was an exception thrown while trying to retrieve the data to enrich from the resource. Setting this option to true allows end users to control what to do if there was an exception in the aggregate method.

aggregationStrategy.title: Aggregation Strategy
aggregationStrategy.description: Sets the AggregationStrategy to be used to merge the reply from the external service, into a single outgoing message. By default Camel will use the reply from the external service as outgoing message.

aggregationStrategyMethodAllowNull.title: Aggregation Strategy Method Allow Null
aggregationStrategyMethodAllowNull.description: If this option is false then the aggregate method is not used if there was no data to enrich. If this option is true then null values is used as the oldExchange (when no data to enrich), when using POJOs as the AggregationStrategy.

aggregationStrategyMethodName.title: Aggregation Strategy Method Name
aggregationStrategyMethodName.description: This option can be used to explicitly declare the method name to use, when using POJOs as the AggregationStrategy.

allowOptimisedComponents.title: Allow Optimised Components
allowOptimisedComponents.description: Whether to allow components to optimise if they are PollDynamicAware.

autoStartComponents.title: Auto Start Components
autoStartComponents.description: Whether to auto startup components when poll enricher is starting up.

cacheSize.title: Cache Size
cacheSize.description: Sets the maximum size used by the ConsumerCache which is used to cache and reuse consumers when uris are reused. Use 0 for default cache size, or -1 to turn cache off.

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: Whether to disable this EIP from the route during build time. Once an EIP has been disabled then it cannot be enabled later at runtime.

ignoreInvalidEndpoint.title: Ignore Invalid Endpoint
ignoreInvalidEndpoint.description: Whether to ignore an invalid endpoint URI when trying to create a consumer with that endpoint.

timeout.title: Timeout
timeout.description: Timeout in millis when polling from the external service. A negative value waits until a message is available (could block indefinitely). Zero attempts to receive immediately without waiting. A positive value waits up to the given timeout.

variableReceive.title: Variable Receive
variableReceive.description: To use a variable to store the received message body (only body, not headers). This makes it handy to use variables for user data and to easily control what data to use for sending and receiving.

org.apache.camel.model.ProcessDefinition.title: Process
org.apache.camel.model.ProcessDefinition.description: Invokes a custom Camel Processor for programmatic message processing in Java

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: Whether to disable this EIP from the route during build time. Once an EIP has been disabled then it cannot be enabled later at runtime.

ref.title: Ref
ref.description: Reference to the Processor to lookup in the registry to use. Can use prefixes such as #bean:, #class:, or #type: to control how the processor is obtained.

org.apache.camel.model.PropertyDefinitio.title: Property
org.apache.camel.model.PropertyDefinitio.description: Defines a key/value pair with a literal value, used for passing parameters in route templates and other configurations

org.apache.camel.model.PropertyExpressio.title: Property Expression
org.apache.camel.model.PropertyExpressio.description: Defines a key/value pair where the value is computed by an expression, used for passing dynamic parameters

expression.title: Expression
expression.description: The property value as an expression.

org.apache.camel.model.RecipientListDefi.title: Recipient List
org.apache.camel.model.RecipientListDefi.description: Routes a message to a list of dynamically calculated endpoints, determined at runtime from an expression. Each recipient receives a copy of the message.

expression.title: Expression
expression.description: The expression to compute the list of recipient endpoint URIs. The result can be a comma-separated string, a Collection, or an Iterator of endpoint URIs.

aggregationStrategy.title: Aggregation Strategy
aggregationStrategy.description: Sets the AggregationStrategy to be used to assemble the replies from the recipients, into a single outgoing message.

aggregationStrategyMethodAllowNull.title: Aggregation Strategy Method Allow Null
aggregationStrategyMethodAllowNull.description: If this option is false then the aggregate method is not used if there was no data to enrich. If this option is true then null values is used as the oldExchange (when no data to enrich), when using POJOs as the AggregationStrategy.

aggregationStrategyMethodName.title: Aggregation Strategy Method Name
aggregationStrategyMethodName.description: This option can be used to explicitly declare the method name to use, when using POJOs as the AggregationStrategy.

cacheSize.title: Cache Size
cacheSize.description: Sets the maximum size used by the ProducerCache which is used to cache and reuse producers when uris are reused. Use 0 for default cache size, or -1 to turn cache off.

delimiter.title: Delimiter
delimiter.description: Delimiter used if the Expression returned multiple endpoints. Can be turned off using the value false.

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: Whether to disable this EIP from the route during build time. Once an EIP has been disabled then it cannot be enabled later at runtime.

executorService.title: Executor Service
executorService.description: Refers to a custom Thread Pool to be used for parallel processing. Notice if you set this option, then parallel processing is automatically implied, and you do not have to enable that option as well.

ignoreInvalidEndpoints.title: Ignore Invalid Endpoints
ignoreInvalidEndpoints.description: Whether to ignore an invalid endpoint URI when trying to create a producer with that endpoint.

onPrepare.title: On Prepare
onPrepare.description: Uses the Processor when preparing the exchange to be sent. This can be used to deep-clone messages that should be sent, or any custom logic needed before the exchange is sent.

parallelAggregate.title: Parallel Aggregate
parallelAggregate.description: If enabled then the aggregate method on AggregationStrategy can be called concurrently. Notice that this would require the implementation of AggregationStrategy to be implemented as thread-safe. By default this is false meaning that Camel synchronizes the call to the aggregate method. Though in some use-cases this can be used to archive higher performance when the AggregationStrategy is implemented as thread-safe.

parallelProcessing.title: Parallel Processing
parallelProcessing.description: If enabled then sending messages to the recipients occurs concurrently. Note the caller thread will still wait until all messages has been fully processed, before it continues.

shareUnitOfWork.title: Share Unit Of Work
shareUnitOfWork.description: Shares the UnitOfWork with the parent and each of the sub messages. Recipient List will by default not share unit of work between the parent exchange and each recipient exchange. This means each sub exchange has its own individual unit of work.

stopOnException.title: Stop On Exception
stopOnException.description: Stops further processing if an exception or failure occurred during processing of an exchange and the caused exception will be thrown.

streaming.title: Streaming
streaming.description: If enabled then Camel will process replies out-of-order, eg in the order they come back. If disabled, Camel will process replies in the same order as defined by the recipient list.

synchronous.title: Synchronous
synchronous.description: Sets whether synchronous processing should be strictly used. When enabled then the same thread is used to continue routing after the recipient list is complete, even if parallel processing is enabled.

timeout.title: Timeout
timeout.description: Sets a total timeout specified in millis, when using parallel processing. If the Recipient List hasn't been able to send and process all replies within the given timeframe, then the timeout triggers and the Recipient List breaks out and continues.

org.apache.camel.model.RedeliveryPolicyD.title: Redelivery Policy
org.apache.camel.model.RedeliveryPolicyD.description: Configures message redelivery for error handling, including maximum retries, delay patterns, and backoff settings

allowRedeliveryWhileStopping.title: Allow Redelivery While Stopping
allowRedeliveryWhileStopping.description: Controls whether to allow redelivery while stopping/shutting down a route that uses error handling.

asyncDelayedRedelivery.title: Async Delayed Redelivery
asyncDelayedRedelivery.description: Allow asynchronous delayed redelivery. The route, in particular the consumer's component, must support the Asynchronous Routing Engine (e.g. seda).

backOffMultiplier.title: Back Off Multiplier
backOffMultiplier.description: Sets the multiplier applied to the previous redelivery delay to compute the next delay when using exponential backoff.

collisionAvoidanceFactor.title: Collision Avoidance Factor
collisionAvoidanceFactor.description: Sets the collision avoidance factor, which adds a random percentage of the delay to avoid thundering herd problems when multiple redeliveries happen simultaneously.

delayPattern.title: Delay Pattern
delayPattern.description: Sets the delay pattern for redeliveries using a pattern such as '0:1000;5:5000;10:30000' where each entry maps a redelivery count to a delay in milliseconds (e.g. redeliveries 0-4 use 1s delay, 5-9 use 5s, 10 use 30s).

disableRedelivery.title: Disable Redelivery
disableRedelivery.description: Disables redelivery (same as setting maximum redeliveries to 0).

exchangeFormatterRef.title: Exchange Formatter Ref
exchangeFormatterRef.description: Sets the reference of the instance of org.apache.camel.spi.ExchangeFormatter to generate the log message from exchange.

logContinued.title: Log Continued
logContinued.description: Whether continued exceptions should be logged or not. Can be used to include or reduce verbose logging.

logExhausted.title: Log Exhausted
logExhausted.description: Whether exhausted exceptions should be logged or not. Can be used to include or reduce verbose logging.

logExhaustedMessageBody.title: Log Exhausted Message Body
logExhaustedMessageBody.description: Whether exhausted message body should be logged including message history. Requires logExhaustedMessageHistory to be enabled.

logExhaustedMessageHistory.title: Log Exhausted Message History
logExhaustedMessageHistory.description: Whether exhausted exceptions should be logged including message history. Can be used to include or reduce verbose logging.

logHandled.title: Log Handled
logHandled.description: Whether handled exceptions should be logged or not. Can be used to include or reduce verbose logging.

logNewException.title: Log New Exception
logNewException.description: Whether new exceptions should be logged or not. A new exception is an exception that was thrown while handling a previous exception.

logRetryAttempted.title: Log Retry Attempted
logRetryAttempted.description: Whether retry attempts should be logged or not. Can be used to include or reduce verbose logging.

logRetryStackTrace.title: Log Retry Stack Trace
logRetryStackTrace.description: Whether stack traces should be logged when a retry attempt failed. Can be used to include or reduce verbose logging.

logStackTrace.title: Log Stack Trace
logStackTrace.description: Whether stack traces should be logged. Can be used to include or reduce verbose logging.

maximumRedeliveries.title: Maximum Redeliveries
maximumRedeliveries.description: Sets the maximum number of redeliveries. Use 0 for no redeliveries, or -1 to redeliver forever.

maximumRedeliveryDelay.title: Maximum Redelivery Delay
maximumRedeliveryDelay.description: Sets the upper bound on redelivery delay in milliseconds when using exponential backoff, to prevent delays from growing unbounded.

redeliveryDelay.title: Redelivery Delay
redeliveryDelay.description: Sets the initial delay in milliseconds before the first redelivery attempt.

retriesExhaustedLogLevel.title: Retries Exhausted Log Level
retriesExhaustedLogLevel.description: Sets the logging level to use when all retries have been exhausted and the message is moved to the dead letter channel or failed.

retryAttemptedLogInterval.title: Retry Attempted Log Interval
retryAttemptedLogInterval.description: Sets how often to log redelivery attempts. For example, a value of 3 logs every 3rd redelivery attempt.

retryAttemptedLogLevel.title: Retry Attempted Log Level
retryAttemptedLogLevel.description: Sets the logging level to use when a redelivery attempt is made.

useCollisionAvoidance.title: Use Collision Avoidance
useCollisionAvoidance.description: Enables collision avoidance, which adds a random factor to redelivery delays to prevent multiple simultaneous redeliveries from colliding.

useExponentialBackOff.title: Use Exponential Back Off
useExponentialBackOff.description: Enables exponential backoff, so each subsequent redelivery delay is multiplied by the backOffMultiplier.

org.apache.camel.model.RemoveHeaderDefin.title: Remove Header
org.apache.camel.model.RemoveHeaderDefin.description: Removes a specific header from the message by name

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: Whether to disable this EIP from the route during build time. Once an EIP has been disabled then it cannot be enabled later at runtime.

org.apache.camel.model.RemoveHeadersDefi.title: Remove Headers
org.apache.camel.model.RemoveHeadersDefi.description: Removes all message headers whose names match a given pattern. Useful for stripping internal Camel headers before sending to external systems.

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: Whether to disable this EIP from the route during build time. Once an EIP has been disabled then it cannot be enabled later at runtime.

excludePattern.title: Exclude Pattern
excludePattern.description: Name or pattern of headers to not remove. You can use comma to separate multiple patterns.

pattern.title: Pattern
pattern.description: Name or pattern of headers to remove. The pattern supports exact match, wildcard (pattern ends with ), and regular expression (all case-insensitive).

org.apache.camel.model.RemovePropertiesD.title: Remove Properties
org.apache.camel.model.RemovePropertiesD.description: Removes all exchange properties whose names match a given pattern

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: Whether to disable this EIP from the route during build time. Once an EIP has been disabled then it cannot be enabled later at runtime.

excludePattern.title: Exclude Pattern
excludePattern.description: Name or pattern of properties to not remove. You can use comma to separate multiple patterns.

pattern.title: Pattern
pattern.description: Name or pattern of properties to remove. Supports exact match, wildcard (ending with ), and regular expression (all case-insensitive).

org.apache.camel.model.RemovePropertyDef.title: Remove Property
org.apache.camel.model.RemovePropertyDef.description: Removes a specific exchange property by name

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: Whether to disable this EIP from the route during build time. Once an EIP has been disabled then it cannot be enabled later at runtime.

name.title: Name
name.description: Name of the exchange property to remove.

org.apache.camel.model.RemoveVariableDef.title: Remove Variable
org.apache.camel.model.RemoveVariableDef.description: Removes a specific variable by name

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: Whether to disable this EIP from the route during build time. Once an EIP has been disabled then it cannot be enabled later at runtime.

name.title: Name
name.description: Name of the variable to remove.

org.apache.camel.model.ResequenceDefinit.title: Resequence
org.apache.camel.model.ResequenceDefinit.description: Reorders messages based on a sequence expression, either in batch mode (collect and sort) or stream mode (continuous reordering with a timeout)

expression.title: Expression
expression.description: Expression to use for re-ordering the messages, such as a header with a sequence number.

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: Whether to disable this EIP from the route during build time. Once an EIP has been disabled then it cannot be enabled later at runtime.

org.apache.camel.model.Resilience4jConfi.title: Resilience4j Configuration
org.apache.camel.model.Resilience4jConfi.description: Configures Resilience4j settings for the Circuit Breaker EIP, such as failure rate threshold, wait duration, and sliding window parameters

automaticTransitionFromOpenToHalfOpenEna.title: Automatic Transition From Open To Half Open Enabled
automaticTransitionFromOpenToHalfOpenEna.description: Enables automatic transition from OPEN to HALF_OPEN state once the waitDurationInOpenState has passed.

bulkheadEnabled.title: Bulkhead Enabled
bulkheadEnabled.description: Whether bulkhead is enabled or not on the circuit breaker.

bulkheadMaxConcurrentCalls.title: Bulkhead Max Concurrent Calls
bulkheadMaxConcurrentCalls.description: Configures the max amount of concurrent calls the bulkhead will support.

bulkheadMaxWaitDuration.title: Bulkhead Max Wait Duration
bulkheadMaxWaitDuration.description: Configures a maximum amount of time which the calling thread will wait to enter the bulkhead.

circuitBreaker.title: Circuit Breaker
circuitBreaker.description: Refers to an existing io.github.resilience4j.circuitbreaker.CircuitBreaker instance to lookup and use from the registry. When using this, then any other circuit breaker options are not in use.

config.title: Config
config.description: Refers to an existing io.github.resilience4j.circuitbreaker.CircuitBreakerConfig instance to lookup and use from the registry.

failureRateThreshold.title: Failure Rate Threshold
failureRateThreshold.description: Configures the failure rate threshold in percentage. If the failure rate is equal or greater than the threshold the CircuitBreaker transitions to open and starts short-circuiting calls.

ignoreException.title: Ignore Exception
ignoreException.description: Configure a list of exceptions that are ignored and neither count as a failure nor success. Any exception matching or inheriting from one of the list will not count as a failure nor success, even if the exception is part of recordExceptions.

micrometerEnabled.title: Micrometer Enabled
micrometerEnabled.description: Whether to enable collecting statistics using Micrometer. This requires adding camel-resilience4j-micrometer JAR to the classpath.

minimumNumberOfCalls.title: Minimum Number Of Calls
minimumNumberOfCalls.description: Configures the minimum number of calls which are required (per sliding window period) before the CircuitBreaker can calculate the error rate.

permittedNumberOfCallsInHalfOpenState.title: Permitted Number Of Calls In Half Open State
permittedNumberOfCallsInHalfOpenState.description: Configures the number of permitted calls when the CircuitBreaker is half open.

recordException.title: Record Exception
recordException.description: Configure a list of exceptions that are recorded as a failure and thus increase the failure rate. Any exception matching or inheriting from one of the list counts as a failure, unless explicitly ignored via ignoreExceptions.

slidingWindowSize.title: Sliding Window Size
slidingWindowSize.description: Configures the size of the sliding window which is used to record the outcome of calls when the CircuitBreaker is closed. Sliding window can either be count-based or time-based.

slidingWindowType.title: Sliding Window Type
slidingWindowType.description: Configures the type of the sliding window which is used to record the outcome of calls when the CircuitBreaker is closed. Sliding window can either be count-based or time-based.

slowCallDurationThreshold.title: Slow Call Duration Threshold
slowCallDurationThreshold.description: Configures the duration threshold (seconds) above which calls are considered as slow and increase the slow calls percentage.

slowCallRateThreshold.title: Slow Call Rate Threshold
slowCallRateThreshold.description: Configures a threshold in percentage. The CircuitBreaker considers a call as slow when the call duration is greater than slowCallDurationThreshold. When the percentage of slow calls is equal or greater the threshold, the CircuitBreaker transitions to open and starts short-circuiting calls.

throwExceptionWhenHalfOpenOrOpenState.title: Throw Exception When Half Open Or Open State
throwExceptionWhenHalfOpenOrOpenState.description: Whether to throw io.github.resilience4j.circuitbreaker.CallNotPermittedException when the call is rejected because the circuit breaker is half open or open.

timeoutCancelRunningFuture.title: Timeout Cancel Running Future
timeoutCancelRunningFuture.description: Configures whether cancel is called on the running future. Defaults to true.

timeoutDuration.title: Timeout Duration
timeoutDuration.description: Configures the thread execution timeout. Default value is 1 second.

timeoutEnabled.title: Timeout Enabled
timeoutEnabled.description: Whether timeout is enabled or not on the circuit breaker.

timeoutExecutorService.title: Timeout Executor Service
timeoutExecutorService.description: References to a custom thread pool to use when timeout is enabled (uses ForkJoinPool.commonPool() by default).

waitDurationInOpenState.title: Wait Duration In Open State
waitDurationInOpenState.description: Configures the wait duration (in seconds) which specifies how long the CircuitBreaker should stay open, before it switches to half open.

writableStackTraceEnabled.title: Writable Stack Trace Enabled
writableStackTraceEnabled.description: Enables writable stack traces. When set to false, Exception.getStackTrace returns a zero length array. This may be used to reduce log spam when the circuit breaker is open.

org.apache.camel.model.RestContextRefDef.title: Rest Context Ref
org.apache.camel.model.RestContextRefDef.description: References an external XML file containing REST service definitions for inclusion in the current context

org.apache.camel.model.ResumableDefiniti.title: Resumable
org.apache.camel.model.ResumableDefiniti.description: Enables resuming processing from the last known offset after a restart, using a resume strategy to track and restore position

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: Whether to disable this EIP from the route during build time. Once an EIP has been disabled then it cannot be enabled later at runtime.

intermittent.title: Intermittent
intermittent.description: Whether the offsets will be intermittently present or whether they must be present in every exchange.

loggingLevel.title: Logging Level
loggingLevel.description: The logging level to use in case of failures.

resumeStrategy.title: Resume Strategy
resumeStrategy.description: The resume strategy to use for resuming processing from the last known offset.

org.apache.camel.model.RollbackDefinitio.title: Rollback
org.apache.camel.model.RollbackDefinitio.description: Forces a rollback of the current transaction and stops routing the message. Can set a custom message on the exception.

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: Whether to disable this EIP from the route during build time. Once an EIP has been disabled then it cannot be enabled later at runtime.

markRollbackOnly.title: Mark Rollback Only
markRollbackOnly.description: If enabled then only the current transaction is marked for rollback. No exception is thrown and the route continues to execute.

markRollbackOnlyLast.title: Mark Rollback Only Last
markRollbackOnlyLast.description: If enabled then only the last sub-transaction (from the last transacted EIP) is marked for rollback. This allows partial rollbacks in nested transaction scenarios.

message.title: Message
message.description: The message to set on the exception when rolling back.

org.apache.camel.model.RouteBuilderDefin.title: Route Builder
org.apache.camel.model.RouteBuilderDefin.description: References a Java RouteBuilder class to include its routes in the current CamelContext

org.apache.camel.model.RouteConfiguratio.title: Route Configuration Context Ref
org.apache.camel.model.RouteConfiguratio.description: References an external XML file containing route configuration definitions for inclusion in the current context

ref.title: Ref
ref.description: Reference to the route configuration in the xml-dsl.

org.apache.camel.model.RouteContextRefDe.title: Route Context Ref
org.apache.camel.model.RouteContextRefDe.description: References an external XML file containing route definitions for inclusion in the current context

ref.title: Ref
ref.description: Reference to the routes in the xml-dsl.

shutdownRoute.description: To control how to shut down the route.

shutdownRunningTask.description: To control how to shut down the route.

org.apache.camel.model.RouteTemplatePara.title: Template Parameter
org.apache.camel.model.RouteTemplatePara.description: Defines a parameter for a route template, with an optional default value and description

defaultValue.title: Default Value
defaultValue.description: The default value of the template parameter. Used when no explicit value is provided when creating a route from the template.

description.title: Description
description.description: Description of the template parameter for documentation purposes.

name.title: Name
name.description: The name of the template parameter.

required.title: Required
required.description: Whether this template parameter is required. A required parameter must have a value provided when creating a route from the template.

org.apache.camel.model.RoutingSlipDefini.title: Routing Slip
org.apache.camel.model.RoutingSlipDefini.description: Routes a message through a pre-determined sequence of endpoints defined in a header or expression (the routing slip). The list of endpoints is evaluated once upfront.

expression.title: Expression
expression.description: The expression to compute the routing slip of endpoint URIs. The result is a delimited list of endpoint URIs that defines the series of processing steps.

cacheSize.title: Cache Size
cacheSize.description: Configures the cache size for ProducerCache which caches producers for reuse. The default cache size is 1000. Set to -1 to turn off caching.

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: Whether to disable this EIP from the route during build time. Once an EIP has been disabled then it cannot be enabled later at runtime.

ignoreInvalidEndpoints.title: Ignore Invalid Endpoints
ignoreInvalidEndpoints.description: If enabled then invalid endpoint URIs are ignored and logged instead of throwing an exception.

uriDelimiter.title: Uri Delimiter
uriDelimiter.description: The delimiter used to separate endpoint URIs in the routing slip expression. Default is comma.

org.apache.camel.model.SagaDefinition.title: Saga
org.apache.camel.model.SagaDefinition.description: Defines a Saga (long-running action) that coordinates distributed services toward a consistent outcome. Unlike XA transactions, Sagas use compensating actions for rollback and work across heterogeneous services.

compensation.title: Compensation
compensation.description: The compensation endpoint URI that must be called to compensate all changes done in the route. The route corresponding to the compensation URI must perform compensation and complete without error.

completion.title: Completion
completion.description: The completion endpoint URI that will be called when the Saga is completed successfully. The route corresponding to the completion URI must perform completion tasks and terminate without error.

completionMode.title: Completion Mode
completionMode.description: Determine how the saga should be considered complete.
