When set to AUTO, the saga is completed when the exchange is processed successfully, or compensated when it completes exceptionally. When set to MANUAL, the user must complete or compensate the saga using the saga:complete or saga:compensate endpoints.

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: Whether to disable this EIP from the route during build time. Once an EIP has been disabled then it cannot be enabled later at runtime.

option.title: Option
option.description: Allows to save properties of the current exchange in order to re-use them in a compensation/completion callback route. Option values will be transformed into input headers of the compensation/completion exchange.

propagation.title: Propagation
propagation.description: Set the Saga propagation mode. REQUIRED joins an existing saga or starts a new one. REQUIRES_NEW always starts a new saga, suspending any existing one. MANDATORY requires an existing saga and fails if none is active. SUPPORTS joins an existing saga if present but does not start a new one. NOT_SUPPORTED executes outside any saga, suspending an existing one. NEVER fails if a saga is already active.

sagaService.title: Saga Service
sagaService.description: Refers to the id to lookup in the registry for the specific CamelSagaService to use

timeout.title: Timeout
timeout.description: Set the maximum amount of time for the Saga. After the timeout is expired, the saga will be compensated automatically (unless a different decision has been taken in the meantime).

org.apache.camel.model.SamplingDefinitio.title: Sample
org.apache.camel.model.SamplingDefinitio.description: Samples a subset of messages passing through the route, either by frequency count or time interval, and discards the rest

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: Whether to disable this EIP from the route during build time. Once an EIP has been disabled then it cannot be enabled later at runtime.

messageFrequency.title: Message Frequency
messageFrequency.description: The frequency of samples as a message count, using a message-frequency approach. For example, a value of 5 means every 5th message is sampled.

samplePeriod.title: Sample Period
samplePeriod.description: The period between samples, using a time-based approach. Default is 1 second.

org.apache.camel.model.ScriptDefinition.title: Script
org.apache.camel.model.ScriptDefinition.description: Executes an expression or script in a chosen language for side effects without modifying the message body

expression.title: Expression
expression.description: The expression to evaluate as a script. The script result does not change the message body (use transform instead if that is desired).

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: Whether to disable this EIP from the route during build time. Once an EIP has been disabled then it cannot be enabled later at runtime.

org.apache.camel.model.SetBodyDefinition.title: Set Body
org.apache.camel.model.SetBodyDefinition.description: Sets the message body to a value computed by an expression

expression.title: Expression
expression.description: The expression whose result is used as the new message body.

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: Whether to disable this EIP from the route during build time. Once an EIP has been disabled then it cannot be enabled later at runtime.

org.apache.camel.model.SetExchangePatter.title: Set Exchange Pattern
org.apache.camel.model.SetExchangePatter.description: Sets the message exchange pattern (MEP) on the exchange, such as InOnly for one-way or InOut for request-reply

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: Whether to disable this EIP from the route during build time. Once an EIP has been disabled then it cannot be enabled later at runtime.

pattern.title: Pattern
pattern.description: The new exchange pattern to use from this point forward.

org.apache.camel.model.SetHeaderDefiniti.title: Set Header
org.apache.camel.model.SetHeaderDefiniti.description: Sets a message header to a value computed by an expression

expression.title: Expression
expression.description: The expression whose result is used as the header value.

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: Whether to disable this EIP from the route during build time. Once an EIP has been disabled then it cannot be enabled later at runtime.

name.title: Name
name.description: Name of message header to set a new value. The simple language can be used to define a dynamic evaluated header name. Otherwise a constant name will be used.

org.apache.camel.model.SetHeadersDefinit.title: Set Headers
org.apache.camel.model.SetHeadersDefinit.description: Sets multiple message headers at once, each computed by its own expression

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: Whether to disable this EIP from the route during build time. Once an EIP has been disabled then it cannot be enabled later at runtime.

headers.title: Headers
headers.description: Contains the headers to be set

org.apache.camel.model.SetPropertyDefini.title: Set Property
org.apache.camel.model.SetPropertyDefini.description: Sets an exchange property to a value computed by an expression

expression.title: Expression
expression.description: The expression whose result is used as the exchange property value.

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: Whether to disable this EIP from the route during build time. Once an EIP has been disabled then it cannot be enabled later at runtime.

name.title: Name
name.description: Name of exchange property to set a new value. The simple language can be used to define a dynamic evaluated property name. Otherwise a constant name will be used.

org.apache.camel.model.SetVariableDefini.title: Set Variable
org.apache.camel.model.SetVariableDefini.description: Sets a variable to a value computed by an expression

expression.title: Expression
expression.description: The expression whose result is used as the variable value.

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: Whether to disable this EIP from the route during build time. Once an EIP has been disabled then it cannot be enabled later at runtime.

name.title: Name
name.description: Name of variable to set a new value. The simple language can be used to define a dynamic evaluated variable name. Otherwise a constant name will be used.

org.apache.camel.model.SetVariablesDefin.title: Set Variables
org.apache.camel.model.SetVariablesDefin.description: Sets multiple variables at once, each computed by its own expression

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: Whether to disable this EIP from the route during build time. Once an EIP has been disabled then it cannot be enabled later at runtime.

variables.title: Variables
variables.description: Contains the variables to be set

org.apache.camel.model.SortDefinition.title: Sort
org.apache.camel.model.SortDefinition.description: Sorts the items in a message body that is a List, using a specified comparator or the default ordering

expression.title: Expression
expression.description: The expression to use for sorting. The message body is split into a list, sorted using this expression as the comparator key, and then reassembled.

comparator.title: Comparator
comparator.description: Sets a reference to lookup for the comparator to use for sorting.

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: Whether to disable this EIP from the route during build time. Once an EIP has been disabled then it cannot be enabled later at runtime.

org.apache.camel.model.SplitDefinition.title: Split
org.apache.camel.model.SplitDefinition.description: Splits a message into multiple sub-messages using an expression, and processes each one individually. Supports parallel processing and result aggregation.

expression.title: Expression
expression.description: The expression that returns the value to use for splitting. The result can be an Iterator, Iterable, Array, Collection, Map, NodeList, or a delimited String.

aggregationStrategy.title: Aggregation Strategy
aggregationStrategy.description: Reference to the AggregationStrategy to assemble the replies from the split messages into a single outgoing message. By default Camel uses the original incoming message.

aggregationStrategyMethodAllowNull.title: Aggregation Strategy Method Allow Null
aggregationStrategyMethodAllowNull.description: If true then null is used as the oldExchange when there is no data to aggregate, when using POJOs as the AggregationStrategy.

aggregationStrategyMethodName.title: Aggregation Strategy Method Name
aggregationStrategyMethodName.description: The method name to use when using a POJO as the AggregationStrategy.

delimiter.title: Delimiter
delimiter.description: Delimiter used in splitting messages. Can be turned off using the value false. To force not splitting then the delimiter can be set to single to use the value as a single list. The default value is comma.

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: Whether to disable this EIP from the route during build time. Once an EIP has been disabled then it cannot be enabled later at runtime.

errorThreshold.title: Error Threshold
errorThreshold.description: Sets the error threshold as a fraction (0.0-1.0) of failed items before aborting the split operation.

executorService.title: Executor Service
executorService.description: Reference to a custom thread pool to use for parallel processing. Setting this option implies parallel processing.

group.title: Group
group.description: Groups N split messages into a single message with a java.util.List body. This allows processing items in chunks instead of one at a time.

maxFailedRecords.title: Max Failed Records
maxFailedRecords.description: Sets the maximum number of failed records before aborting the split operation.

onPrepare.title: On Prepare
onPrepare.description: Reference to a processor for preparing the exchange to be sent. Can be used to deep-clone messages that should be sent.

parallelAggregate.title: Parallel Aggregate
parallelAggregate.description: If enabled then the aggregate method on AggregationStrategy can be called concurrently. Notice that this would require the implementation of AggregationStrategy to be implemented as thread-safe. By default this is false meaning that Camel synchronizes the call to the aggregate method. Though in some use-cases this can be used to archive higher performance when the AggregationStrategy is implemented as thread-safe.

parallelProcessing.title: Parallel Processing
parallelProcessing.description: If enabled then processing each split message occurs concurrently. The caller thread still waits until all messages are fully processed before it continues.

resumeStrategy.title: Resume Strategy
resumeStrategy.description: Sets a reference to a ResumeStrategy in the registry for resume-from-last-position support.

shareUnitOfWork.title: Share Unit Of Work
shareUnitOfWork.description: Shares the unit of work with the parent and each of the split messages. By default each split exchange has its own individual unit of work.

stopOnException.title: Stop On Exception
stopOnException.description: If enabled then stops further split processing if an exception or failure occurred during processing of a split message, and the caused exception will be thrown. The default behavior is to not stop but continue processing till the end.

streaming.title: Streaming
streaming.description: When enabled then the splitter splits the original message on-demand, and each split message is processed one by one. This reduces memory usage as the splitter does not split all messages first.

synchronous.title: Synchronous
synchronous.description: When enabled then the same thread is used to continue routing after the split is complete, even if parallel processing is enabled.

timeout.title: Timeout
timeout.description: Total timeout in millis when using parallel processing. If the splitter has not been able to process all replies within the given timeframe, then the timeout triggers and the splitter breaks out and continues.

watermarkExpression.title: Watermark Expression
watermarkExpression.description: Sets a Simple expression to evaluate on the exchange after split completion to determine the new watermark value.

watermarkKey.title: Watermark Key
watermarkKey.description: Sets the key to use in the watermark store.

org.apache.camel.model.StepDefinition.title: Step
org.apache.camel.model.StepDefinition.description: Groups a sequence of processing steps under a single logical name for improved monitoring, management, and tracing visibility

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: Whether to disable this EIP from the route during build time. Once an EIP has been disabled then it cannot be enabled later at runtime.

org.apache.camel.model.StopDefinition.title: Stop
org.apache.camel.model.StopDefinition.description: Stops processing of the current message and marks the exchange as completed without sending it to any further steps

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: Whether to disable this EIP from the route during build time. Once an EIP has been disabled then it cannot be enabled later at runtime.

org.apache.camel.model.TemplatedRoutePar.title: Templated Route Parameter
org.apache.camel.model.TemplatedRoutePar.description: Provides a parameter value for a templated route, binding a value to a route template parameter

org.apache.camel.model.ThreadPoolProfile.title: Thread Pool Profile
org.apache.camel.model.ThreadPoolProfile.description: Defines a named thread pool profile with pool size, queue size, and thread keep-alive settings for use by EIPs and components

allowCoreThreadTimeOut.title: Allow Core Thread Time Out
allowCoreThreadTimeOut.description: Whether idle core threads are allowed to timeout and therefore can shrink the pool size below the core pool size

defaultProfile.title: Default Profile
defaultProfile.description: Whether this profile is the default thread pool profile

keepAliveTime.title: Keep Alive Time
keepAliveTime.description: Sets the keep alive time for idle threads before they are terminated. Only applies to threads above the core pool size.

maxPoolSize.title: Max Pool Size
maxPoolSize.description: Sets the maximum pool size (the upper bound of threads in the pool).

maxQueueSize.title: Max Queue Size
maxQueueSize.description: Sets the maximum number of tasks in the work queue. Use -1 or Integer.MAX_VALUE for an unbounded queue.

poolSize.title: Pool Size
poolSize.description: Sets the core pool size (number of threads to keep in the pool, even if idle).

rejectedPolicy.title: Rejected Policy
rejectedPolicy.description: Sets the handler for tasks which cannot be executed by the thread pool

timeUnit.title: Time Unit
timeUnit.description: Sets the time unit to use for keep alive time. By default SECONDS is used.

org.apache.camel.model.ThreadsDefinition.title: Threads
org.apache.camel.model.ThreadsDefinition.description: Offloads processing of subsequent steps in the route to a thread pool, enabling asynchronous and concurrent message handling

allowCoreThreadTimeOut.title: Allow Core Thread Time Out
allowCoreThreadTimeOut.description: Whether idle core threads are allowed to timeout and therefore can shrink the pool size below the core pool size

callerRunsWhenRejected.title: Caller Runs When Rejected
callerRunsWhenRejected.description: Whether to use the caller thread as fallback when a task is rejected being added to the thread pool (when its full). This is only used as fallback if no rejectedPolicy has been configured, or the thread pool has no configured rejection handler.

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: Whether to disable this EIP from the route during build time. Once an EIP has been disabled then it cannot be enabled later at runtime.

executorService.title: Executor Service
executorService.description: To refer to a custom thread pool or use a thread pool profile (as overlay)

keepAliveTime.title: Keep Alive Time
keepAliveTime.description: Sets the keep alive time for idle threads before they are terminated. Only applies to threads above the core pool size.

maxPoolSize.title: Max Pool Size
maxPoolSize.description: Sets the maximum pool size (the upper bound of threads in the pool).

maxQueueSize.title: Max Queue Size
maxQueueSize.description: Sets the maximum number of tasks in the work queue. Use -1 or Integer.MAX_VALUE for an unbounded queue.

poolSize.title: Pool Size
poolSize.description: Sets the core pool size (number of threads to keep in the pool, even if idle).

rejectedPolicy.title: Rejected Policy
rejectedPolicy.description: Sets the handler for tasks which cannot be executed by the thread pool

threadName.title: Thread Name
threadName.description: Sets the thread name pattern to use for naming threads created by this thread pool.

timeUnit.title: Time Unit
timeUnit.description: Sets the time unit for the keep alive time. By default SECONDS is used.

org.apache.camel.model.ThrottleDefinitio.title: Throttle
org.apache.camel.model.ThrottleDefinitio.description: Limits the message throughput to a maximum number of messages per time period to avoid overloading downstream systems

expression.title: Expression
expression.description: The expression to set the maximum request count (for TotalRequests mode) or the maximum number of concurrent requests (for ConcurrentRequests mode).

asyncDelayed.title: Async Delayed
asyncDelayed.description: Enables asynchronous delay which means the thread will not block while delaying.

callerRunsWhenRejected.title: Caller Runs When Rejected
callerRunsWhenRejected.description: Whether or not the caller should run the task when it was rejected by the thread pool.

correlationExpression.title: Correlation Expression
correlationExpression.description: The correlation expression to use for throttle grouping. Exchanges with the same correlation key are throttled together.

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: Whether to disable this EIP from the route during build time. Once an EIP has been disabled then it cannot be enabled later at runtime.

executorService.title: Executor Service
executorService.description: To use a custom thread pool (ScheduledExecutorService) by the throttler.

mode.title: Mode
mode.description: Sets the throttling mode. TotalRequests limits the total number of requests within a time period. ConcurrentRequests uses a leaky-bucket algorithm to limit the number of concurrent requests being processed at the same time.

rejectExecution.title: Reject Execution
rejectExecution.description: Whether or not throttler throws the ThrottlerRejectedExecutionException when the exchange exceeds the request limit.

timePeriodMillis.title: Time Period Millis
timePeriodMillis.description: Sets the time period during which the maximum request count is valid for.

org.apache.camel.model.ThrowExceptionDef.title: Throw Exception
org.apache.camel.model.ThrowExceptionDef.description: Throws an exception during route processing, either creating a new exception instance or re-throwing an existing one

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: Whether to disable this EIP from the route during build time. Once an EIP has been disabled then it cannot be enabled later at runtime.

exceptionType.title: Exception Type
exceptionType.description: The fully qualified class name of the exception to throw. Used together with message.

message.title: Message
message.description: The message text for the exception to be thrown. Supports simple language expressions.

ref.title: Ref
ref.description: Reference to an existing exception instance to lookup from the registry and throw.

org.apache.camel.model.ToDefinition.title: To
org.apache.camel.model.ToDefinition.description: Sends the message to a fixed endpoint URI

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: Whether to disable this EIP from the route during build time. Once an EIP has been disabled then it cannot be enabled later at runtime.

pattern.title: Pattern
pattern.description: Sets the optional ExchangePattern to use. If not specified the default exchange pattern is used.

uri.title: Uri
uri.description: The uri of the endpoint to send to.

variableReceive.title: Variable Receive
variableReceive.description: To use a variable to store the received message body (only body, not headers). This makes it handy to use variables for user data and to easily control what data to use for sending and receiving.

variableSend.title: Variable Send
variableSend.description: To use a variable as the source for the message body to send. This makes it handy to use variables for user data and to easily control what data to use for sending and receiving.

org.apache.camel.model.ToDynamicDefiniti.title: To D
org.apache.camel.model.ToDynamicDefiniti.description: Sends the message to an endpoint URI computed dynamically from an expression, allowing the destination to vary per message

allowOptimisedComponents.title: Allow Optimised Components
allowOptimisedComponents.description: Whether to allow components to optimise toD if they are SendDynamicAware.

autoStartComponents.title: Auto Start Components
autoStartComponents.description: Whether to auto startup components when toD is starting up.

cacheSize.title: Cache Size
cacheSize.description: Sets the maximum size used by the ProducerCache which is used to cache and reuse producers when uris are reused. Use 0 for default cache size, or -1 to turn cache off.

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: Whether to disable this EIP from the route during build time. Once an EIP has been disabled then it cannot be enabled later at runtime.

ignoreInvalidEndpoint.title: Ignore Invalid Endpoint
ignoreInvalidEndpoint.description: Whether to ignore invalid endpoint URIs and skip sending the message.

pattern.title: Pattern
pattern.description: Sets the optional ExchangePattern used to invoke this endpoint.

uri.title: Uri
uri.description: The uri of the endpoint to send to. The uri can be dynamic computed using the simple language.

variableReceive.title: Variable Receive
variableReceive.description: To use a variable to store the received message body (only body, not headers). This makes it handy to use variables for user data and to easily control what data to use for sending and receiving.

variableSend.title: Variable Send
variableSend.description: To use a variable as the source for the message body to send. This makes it handy to use variables for user data and to easily control what data to use for sending and receiving.

org.apache.camel.model.TokenizerDefiniti.title: Specialized tokenizer for AI applications
org.apache.camel.model.TokenizerDefiniti.description: Tokenizes the message body for AI processing, splitting text into chunks suitable for embedding or LLM input

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: Whether to disable this EIP from the route during build time. Once an EIP has been disabled then it cannot be enabled later at runtime.

org.apache.camel.model.TransactedDefinit.title: Transacted
org.apache.camel.model.TransactedDefinit.description: Wraps the route in a transaction, ensuring that all steps within the transacted block either complete together or roll back on failure

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: Whether to disable this EIP from the route during build time. Once an EIP has been disabled then it cannot be enabled later at runtime.

ref.title: Ref
ref.description: Reference to lookup a transacted policy in the registry.

org.apache.camel.model.TransformDataType.title: Transform Data Type
org.apache.camel.model.TransformDataType.description: Transforms the message body between known data types (such as XML, JSON, Java objects) using registered data type transformers

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: Whether to disable this EIP from the route during build time. Once an EIP has been disabled then it cannot be enabled later at runtime.

fromType.title: From Type

onPrepareFailureRef.description: Sets a reference to a processor to prepare the exchange before handled by the failure processor or dead letter channel. This allows for example to enrich the message before sending to a dead letter queue.

retryWhileRef.title: Retry While Ref
retryWhileRef.description: Sets a reference to a retry while predicate. Redelivery continues as long as the predicate evaluates to true.

exception.title: Exception
exception.description: A list of class names for specific exceptions to monitor. If no exceptions are configured then all exceptions are monitored.

maximumFailoverAttempts.description: A value to indicate after X failover attempts we should exhaust (give up). Use -1 to indicate never give up and continuously try to failover. Use 0 to never failover. Use e.g. 3 to failover at most 3 times before giving up.

roundRobin.description: Whether to use round robin mode. If enabled, the load balancer keeps state and continues with the next endpoint in a round robin fashion. If not, it always starts from the first endpoint for every message.

sticky.title: Sticky
sticky.description: Whether to use sticky mode. If enabled, the load balancer keeps state and continues with the last known good endpoint.

correlationExpression.description: The correlation expression to use to calculate the correlation key.

distributionRatio.description: The distribution ratio is a delimited String consisting of integer weights separated by delimiters for example 2,3,5. The distributionRatio must match the number of endpoints and/or processors specified in the load balancer list.
